title: PEER HOUSE - 211info
text: PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER PEER HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Navigation center offers clothing, toiletries, restrooms, light snacks, and beverages, bus passes (10 per month, by availability), internet access, device charging station, a community phone, and a temporary mailing address. Also provides a secure location for medication storage, including refrigeration and Narcan/Naloxone on site. 16389 Highway 101 S Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Medication storage: Unsheltered individuals All other services: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email (541) 251-0825 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 251-0825 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: General Clothing Provision * Homelessness Issues Opioid Antidote Distribution * Homelessness Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homelessness Issues Public Internet Access Sites * Homelessness Issues Public Restrooms * Homelessness Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Homelessness Issues Transportation Passes * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - PEER HOUSE DONATIONS HOUSING/SHELTER - RAPID REHOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESOURCE NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER
